summary: EXP-246 delivers a targeted sentence-replacement patch for WIN-067 detail_evidence that completes the hanging closing sentence flagged by curmudgeon c10 H4. Replaces the orphan single-sentence paragraph ("...H(r) ≈ 1,400–840 km.") with a three-sentence synthesis that quantifies the H(r) collapse (6–10×), translates it into the gravity-prediction overshoot under monotonic H↔g coupling, and forecloses the ‘apparent vs physical’ escape via Section 1.8. before-substring verified unique at index 9837 in current workspace data/wins.json. JSON validated. Tracker EXP-246 status set to 'complete' with output_file path. After integration, ISS-1503 should close.
